steps.title: Read two points from the table
steps.content:
From the table, when the number of cars c=0, the passenger-crew total is p=9.
When c=1, the total is p=64.

steps.title: Find slope and intercept
steps.content:
The slope is $$m = \frac{64-9}{1-0}=55$$ passengers per car.
Using p = mc + b and the point (0,9) gives b=9, so $$p = 55c + 9$$.

steps.title: Write equation in given form and match choice
steps.content:
Rewrite as $55c - p = -9$.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
